basic_details.short_information: Central Agricultural University (CAU) Multi-Tasking Staff (Training Co-ordinator) Notification 2026 has been released on 01 June 2026 on the official website cau.ac.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the CAU MTS (Training Co-ordinator) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.age_details: As per Govt. of India norms. Relaxation: 5 years for SC/ST/Women, 3 years for OBC.
age_limit.details: As per Govt. of India norms. Relaxation: 5 years for SC/ST/Women, 3 years for OBC.

qualification.details: MTS (Training Co-ordinator): Bachelor's degree in Agriculture/Allied sciences obtained from a recognized University. At least 02 years of experience of working in ISP/4G/5G Ecosystem/Basic knowledge on Drone, IOT & 3D Printing Technologies. PG degree in respective streams. Should be acquainted with MS Office & have sufficient computer skills. Should be ready to coordinate.

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for the CAU recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for the Central Agricultural University recruitment is MTS (Training Co-ordinator).

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies announced?
faq.answer: A total of 1 vacancy has been announced for the MTS (Training Co-ordinator) post.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification required is a Bachelor's degree in Agriculture/Allied sciences.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the MTS (Training Co-ordinator) position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 35,000/- Per Month.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in.

faq.question: Q6. When is the walk-in interview scheduled?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview is scheduled for 08 June 2026.

faq.question: Q7. What is the age relaxation provided?
faq.answer: Age relaxation is 5 years for SC/ST/Women and 3 years for OBC candidates.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: You should carry all original documents, 02 xerox copies, and 02 passport size photographs.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the walk-in interview venue?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at College of Agriculture, Pasighat, Arunachal Pradesh, 791102.

faq.question: Q10. Is there any experience required for this post?
faq.answer: Yes, at least 02 years of experience in ISP/4G/5G Ecosystem or basic knowledge on Drone, IOT & 3D Printing Technologies is desirable.
